action: Replace caller-asserted signature verification with direct DSSE verification over exact attestation payload bytes.
finding: DSSE Pre-Authentication Encoding binds the payload type and serialized body; verification must reject decoding or signature failure and must deliver the same verified bytes to the application layer.
verification: 6 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical source and test files.
limits: Direct key verification does not establish certificate-chain validity, transparency-log inclusion, trusted time, signer authorization, provenance policy, or claim truth.
handoff: Integrate verifyDsseEnvelope into R-005 so evaluateEvidenceAcceptance receives a verifier result derived from the exact DSSE envelope and trusted key set, then add Sigstore bundle or GitHub attestation verification for certificate, transparency, and identity policy.
